channel.title: Illumio — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Illumio (illumio).

item.title: CVE-2023-5183 · 9.9 CRITICAL — Authenticated RCE due to unsafe JSON deserialization
item.description: Unsafe deserialization of untrusted JSON allows execution of arbitrary code on affected releases of the Illumio PCE. Authentication to the API is required to exploit this vulnerability. The flaw exists within the network_traffic API endpoint. An atta…
